ddls:
CREATE TABLE "substances" (
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each substance */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the substance */,
  "cas_no" TEXT /* CAS number of the substance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the substance */,
  "msds_link" TEXT /* Link to the Material Safety Data Sheet (MSDS) */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions required for storing the substance safely */,
  "hazard_class" TEXT /* Hazard class of the substance */,
  "hazard_statement" TEXT /* Statement describing the hazards associated with the substance */,
  "precautionary_statement" TEXT /* Precautionary measures to be taken when handling the substance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the substance was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the substance information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "batches" (
  "batch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each batch */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance in the batch */,
  "batch_name" TEXT /* Name of the batch */,
  "batch_date" TEXT /* Date the batch was created */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the substance in the batch */,
  "unit_of_measure" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the quantity */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date by which the batch should be used */,
  "storage_location" TEXT /* Location where the batch is stored */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the batch was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the batch information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("batch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_batches_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES substances ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regulatory_limits" (
  "limit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulatory limit */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance the limit applies to */,
  "limit_value" REAL /* Value of the regulatory limit */,
  "limit_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the regulatory limit (e.g., %) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the limit became effective */,
  "regulatory_body" TEXT /* Regulatory body that set the limit */,
  "regulatory_document" TEXT /* Reference to the document or regulation that specifies the limit */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the regulatory limit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the regulatory limit was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the regulatory limit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("limit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regulatory_limits_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES substances ("substance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher, production staff) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission is assigned to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_substance, edit_batch) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance the change was made to */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, insert, delete) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the change made */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the change was made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the audit entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES substances ("substance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "substance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the substance the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., compliance, non-compliance) */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path where the report is stored */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_substance_id FOREIGN KEY ("substance_id") REFERENCES substances ("substance_id")
)
